programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Santa Claus is coming to town--but so are obnoxious relatives, gifts you have no use for, and drunken co-workers. Dr. Phil, along with etiquette expert Peggy Post, have answers for handling uncomfortable situations at end-of-year festivities.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Harv and Lynne say their son, Mark, is an adolescent living in a 41-year-old man’s body. Mark is currently homeless and living in his beat-up car held together with bungee cords and glue. But Mark explains that he is “car camping” and not homeless.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil examines two headlines: A handyman's discovery of four mentally challenged people held captive in a tiny, dank sub-basement of a Philadelphia building. Plus parents in a Washington suburb face charges for imprisoning & starving 16-year-old twins.

programme.title: Dr. Phil Primetime
programme.desc: In a nation where tensions are running high and tempers are flaring, the escalating levels of anger in America today demand our urgent attention.

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues to piece together this puzzle of Robert and the women he thinks he is dating online. Now, an investigation extends to various locations to track down and verify information Robert says he has received from his “girlfriends.” Part 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Bullies roam schools & playground--also work, social circles & under your own roof! Temica RoShawn, 26, admits to physically & verbally abusing overweight & people with disabilities. Comedian Kirk Fox goes undercover as a wheelchair user to test bias's.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Donna has extreme hatred for her daughter-in-law, Jen, and it's coming between her relationship with her son, Brad. Jen & Brad say they're so terrified of Donna, they changed the locks and sleep with a gun. Can Dr. Phil calm these feuding in-laws?

programme.title: Dr. Phil

programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Dylan takes Kelly to Mexico for a day and buys her a gift, but Kelly rejects him to focus on her relationship with Matt. Dylan soon takes Gina to Mexico and buys her the same gift.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Lauren moves into the Walsh house; Steve's idea for his paper leads to an alert about a potential health problem; Donna agrees to pose as David's girlfriend at a business function; Gina worries she can't keep pace with Dylan.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: Kelly and Dylan agree to go to Mexico and obtain medication for Lauren. Donna agrees to a date with the persistent David. Gina discovers that her mother spent most of the money she earned skating as a minor.

programme.desc: Kelly and Dylan subdue a man who tries to attack a pregnant woman and her child. Gina receives an offer to become a skating commentator. Noah reveals that he has a half-sister, who is working at a nearby diner.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: The spoof that started it all. Scream with the Wayans brothers, Carmen Electra, Shannon Elizabeth, and Anna Faris as they bumble and shriek their way to horror-movie hilarity in Scary Movie.

programme.title: Scary Movie 2
programme.desc: Four teens are tricked by their professor into visiting a haunted house for a school project.

programme.title: Scary Movie 3
programme.desc: David Zucker (AIRPLANE!) directs SCARY MOVIE 3, which piles on hysterical, yet gratuitous, cameos with thrillers, blockbusters, and pop-culture in general getting their best goosing yet.

programme.title: Blankman
programme.desc: In Living Color's favorite team of Damon Wayans and David Alan Grier joins Robin Givens, Jon Polito and Jason Alexander in this hilarious crime-fighting comedy about two slapstick heroes who triumph over evil... more or less. Rated PG-13

programme.title: Mo' Money
programme.desc: You can never be too rich...or too funny. Comedian Damon Wayans brings his rogue's gallery of outrageous characters to this action-filled comedy about a con artist who tries to go straight, but keeps getting pulled in the wrong direction.

programme.title: Head of State
programme.desc: When Washington desperately needs a presidential candidate just weeks before the election, they need someone sure to lose. They pick Mays Gilliam (Chris Rock), an unknown local politician from a down-and-out D.C. neighborhood, to be their puppet.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: Death at a Funeral is a hilarious day in the life of an American family come together to put a beloved husband and father to rest.

programme.title: Trading Places
programme.desc: The story of a down-and-out con artist who trades lifestyles with a well-to-do investor.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: The family flashes back to the Disco Decade when Ray and Lisa attend a 1970s theme party, while Tamera falls prey to a man who promises to launch her modeling career.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: A high school nerd out to woo Tia turns to Tamera for help in updating his image, but when his makeover is complete, Tamera realizes she wants to keep him for herself!

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: When a girl from Tia's old neighborhood challenges her to a double Dutch jump rope contest, Tia becomes obsessed with winning.

programme.title: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Tia and Tamera wind up in student court, where the two boys who are supposedly defending them wind up dissing them instead.
After Lester's Army stories convince Calvin to drop out of school to enlist, Mary insists that her husband undo the damage and talk Calvin into going back to college.
After learning that Lester won't be able to make his own birthday party, Mary and Sandra try to surprise him but end up being initiated into a motorcycle gang instead.
Brenda cuts corners in producing a history essay that stands to win her a place in a Bobby Brown (himself) video, while Julian scams to turn the visiting singer into his own merchandising gold mine.
Dylan's mother, Millie, leaves her husband after discovering he had an affair and after showing up to stay with her son, she ends up on a date with Julian.
Sandra scrambles for a power position in an advertising agency after she fibs and tells her new date she is a major executive in the business world.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie ignores Nicolette's premonition and agrees to fill in for an injured race car driver.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: In order to impress Nicolette and humiliate a potential suitor, Eddie steps in for Malcolm to coach a youth basketball team.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: Eddie enlists Malcolm to help babysit for his infant cousin.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: An argument leads to Malcolm and Eddie recalling their years together.

programme.title: Malcolm & Eddie
programme.desc: An old rival's visit causes Simone to pretend she and Malcolm are husband and wife.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred and Lamont are outraged when they see a new television series about a man, his son and their junk business. Although the TV family is obviously dissimilar, the Sanfords prepare to sue the network to protect their reputation.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: The only way for Fred to get his white brother-in-law Rodney out of his house and his hair is to do something drastic -- like go into show business.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Working on a campaign for a political candidate, singer/actress Della Reese convinces Fred to let her use the Sanford home as campaign headquarters. It doesn't seem to matter to Fred that Lamont is supporting the other candidate.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: It's now or never for Fred when his girlfriend Donna receives a proposal from another man. She hands him an ultimatum that sends shock waves up and down his bachelor spine.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: Fred attempts to transform the lowly Esther into an elegant lady in order to collect $500 from her husband. When she enters a beauty contest, in which Lamont happens to be a judge, Fred thinks being rich is far more important than being honest.

programme.title: Sanford and Son
programme.desc: After he discovers how well and how cheaply his Japanese friend can cook, Fred turns his living room into a Japanese restaurant. Lamont explodes when he discovers his home has become 'Sanford and Rising Sun.'

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: George thinks he's found the perfect new maid -- a proper lady of starch and straight lace, but Louise has her own candidate for the job.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: A receding hairline and midriff bulge have George convinced that he's no longer attractive and Louise's attempts to rekindle the flames of romance in his heart almost backfire.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: With Florence trying her hand at a new career, her replacement soon discovers filling her shoes as the Jefferson's maid could be impossible, especially if she not only has to put up with George but also with the 'ever-present' Florence.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: With her shot at a new career in cinders, Florence enthusiastically returns to the Jeffersons' household expecting her old job back -- only to find her shoes have been filled, in the conclusion of a special two-part story.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: Afraid of being forgotten, George is determined to die a legend and sets out to create a legacy by which his name will live on forever.

programme.title: The Jeffersons
programme.desc: On her birthday, Louise is distraught over news that some 'cold-hearted monster' plans to build a business on the site of the only neighborhood playground.

programme.desc: Nick, Suzanne, and Kevin pull pranks on each other, but their addiction leads to a near-death experience.

programme.desc: Nick suffers a concussion.

programme.desc: Nick worries about his mortality and creates a bucket list featuring overly dangerous activities. Meanwhile, Kevin and Troy launch an underground candy ring at school.

programme.desc: Nick and others enter a contest to win a house.

programme.title: Are We There Yet?

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: O'S**t's attorney, Paul Lieber, pulls some strings in the courtroom in attempt to get O'S**t out of his legal mess. Dutchess invites Quani on her upcoming trip to Paris. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and the crew are flying high on the new renovations, but when it's time to say "Bon voyage" to Dutchess, Ceaser begins having second thoughts about his former flame. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser takes Sky's advice to heart and decides to take a little trip across the globe to surprise Dutchess. While Ceaser and Dutchess spend time together in Paris, Quani tries to come to terms with her feelings about her husband, Puma. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess have returned from Paris as a couple and the crew wonders what this means for the future of the shop. Quani tells Puma that she wants a career and is pissed when Puma laughs it off. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser and Dutchess finally show up at the shop and Donna and Ceaser go at it. Walt reunites with his long lost family and O'S**t, still in rehab, receives frightening news. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: With Anya in the hospital, O'S**t tries to fix his relationship. Sassy decides to introduce her new girlfriend to the crew. Meanwhile, Ceaser, Dutchess, & Ted go to Arizona to bring Sky home but find out Sky's facing 8 years in jail. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ted's true feelings come to light upon Sky's 2-month sentence to Tent City, one of the most controversial jails in the world. Puma's business partner, Med, plays mediator trying to squash the beef and bring the old friends back together. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Quani and Puma are officially "turned up", causing them to miss the Black Ink photo shoot. O'S**t heads to court to find out the outcome of his gun charge. Quani curses out Ceaser, causing a full-blown riot on the streets of Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: The pressure is on for Ceaser when Dutchess' parents arrive for their engagement party. Quani and Puma make it clear that this war isn't over. Sky struggles with the emotions she feels over leaving Tent City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Sky is freed from Tent City andTed is waiting outside for her. When Kathie has DNA results in hand, O'Sh*t deals with his past. Puma creates a plan to protect his family but results in a full-out brawl on the streets of New York City. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of the fashion show incident, the crew works on rebuilding and proving that they are stronger than ever before. When Sassy shows up, Ceaser makes it clear that anyone associated with Puma is not allowed on his turf. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: When Donna speaks her mind one too many times for Ceaser's liking, he sends her packing. A customer appreciation (aka mixxxy) field trip to a water park ends in fireworks when Sky finds out that Ted has been messing around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: In the wake of Puma's devastating loss of Ink 124, Ceaser meets with Med, who gives him the offer of a lifetime. Now, Ceaser finds himself torn between his inevitable and dreaded move to North Carolina, and the chance to run Harlem. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew
programme.desc: Ceaser finds himself looking for a house in North Carolina. Daddy Rick fires up the grill for some good old Southern hospitality, and for Ceaser, the pressure is on. Back in Harlem, Sky checks in with Puma and tells him to man up. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.title: Everybody Hates Chris

programme.desc: Nikki’s wedding has a shocking effect on Oglevee.

programme.title: The Parkers

programme.title: Eve

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Following the advice of a self-help book, Shelly formally asks J.T. in an e-mail to return all her uncollected possessions. J.T. responds that he wants the money he loaned Shelly to be repaid first.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: Injuring her knee while exercising, Shelly puts her pride aside and turns to J.T. for physical therapy. A cute doctor in J.T.'s office asks Shelly out, jealous J.T. gives her some unnecessary medical advice to sabotage the date.

programme.title: Eve
programme.desc: After learning that Rita was evicted from her apartment, Janie agrees to let Rita stay at her house until she is financially stable, but Shelly feels neglected as her two friends rediscover their Cajun roots together.

programme.title: Girlfriends
programme.desc: In order to prevent Aaron from going to Iraq, Joan kidnaps him and takes him to Mexico. In Mexico, Aaron explains to Joan that he cannot run away from the war and suggests they get married before he leaves.

programme.title: Girlfriends
programme.desc: When Lynn meets Xander, a cute student at UCLA, he asks her to perform at a rally raising awareness to save the environment. But when Lynn's manager gets her a gig at the House of Blues for the same day, she must decide where she will perform.

programme.title: Girlfriends
programme.desc: Maya tries to avoid calls from her publisher when she experiences writer's block and is unable to complete her third book.

programme.title: Girlfriends

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: When Vanessa and Geneva get stranded in the middle of a forest due to a broken down car, Mark is forced to chaperone Nicole's slumber party by himself.

programme.desc: Mark gets in an accident with the school's drivers' education car and fears the tough, new principal, P.J. Moore, may discharge him. Sherman Hemsley and Don Cheadle guest star.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: When Vanessa is not given the promotion she was promised, she takes Mark's advice to demand her rights and is promptly discharged from her job.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: Mark persuades Geneva to use "reverse psychology" on the rebellious Nicole, and they let her do anything she wants to teach her that rules are important. Vanessa pretends to like sports to impress a man.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper
programme.desc: Mark learns that Earvin is prejudiced against Koreans when Mark puts a Korean boy on the basketball team.

programme.title: Hangin' With Mr. Cooper

programme.desc: Danny se encarga de un caso personal que involucra a un miembro del cartel de la droga, Louis Delgado, quien Danny cree que es responsable por incendiar su casa. Erin es ascendida en la oficina del fiscal, pero se encuentra en una situación difícil.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Gormley busca ayuda de Danny y Baez para localizar a un ex detective de la policía de Nueva York que puede ser una amenaza para la seguridad de Frank.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Danny investiga un caso que involucra a una mujer que le disparó a su marido cuando estuvo borracha. Los instintos de Danny le dicen que hay más detrás de la historia.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español)
programme.desc: Cuando la ciudad de Nueva York experiencia un gran apagón, los policías se esfuerzan a contener el caos. Frank después descubre algunas verdades desagradables sobre su departamento.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Una serie de secuestros dirigidos cerca de Memphis tiene la BAU en busca de una coincidencia entre las personas desaparecidas y un motivo que les llevará al sospechoso.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando las víctimas son encontradas muertas por envenenamiento con arsénico en Long Beach, California, amenazas de muerte escritas a mano y otras pistas hacen que la UAC busque a un sujeto fascinado con la mitología griega.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando la UAC es llamada a Texas para realizar consultas sobre los asesinatos de prostitutas, la evidencia apunta a asesinatos con connotaciones religiosas. Pero a medida que profundicen en la investigación, el equipo podría poner en riesgo sus vidas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC continúa su investigación de asesinato en Texas y las pistas descubren una profunda red de corrupción que podría ser el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS investiga la muerte de un almirante de la Marina, la cual toma un giro inesperado y emotivo cuando se encuentran con una mujer buscando a su marido desaparecido, un refugiado político africano.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS cuida a un niño de nueve años cuyo padre es buscado por un caso de asesinato sin resolver.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS paga un alto precio cuando intentan localizar a un marino que cree que aún se encuentra en Irak.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man caught shoplifting gets an earful from his fed-up mom, police use surveillance video to track down an armed robber, and deputies oversee a contentious custody exchange.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disoriented suspect would rather take a shower than comply with officers, a stolen vehicle sting nets a surprisingly young driver, and a traffic stop leads to a drug arrest.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A neighborhood patrol investigates a car with no plates, a man walking in the street takes off when approached by officers, and a man breaks down as police search his vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police pursue a fleeing vehicle through backyards, officers follow the trail of a suicidal man who may be armed, and a family argument over chips and dip leads to violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a possible stolen vehicle, a man upset with his neighbors takes matters into his own hands, and officers try to placate a man holding a knife to his own throat.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A person in a wheelchair gets the better of a possible assailant, a domestic argument escalates to biting, and a man who cuts off a patrolman goes on the offensive.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man wrecks his friend's car while fleeing police, detectives arrest a man wanted for armed robbery and attempted murder, and officers spy a subject who eluded them earlier.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gets Tased while resisting arrest, police interrupt a transaction going down in a parked vehicle, and a man fired from his job vents his anger at a gas station.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A mom takes sides when a battle breaks out between brothers, and a man is accused of targeting children with a BB gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A narcotics sting in Alabama yields arrests, officers chase a drunk driver to his front yard, and a woman who called the police for help does not make a good case for herself.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a mental health crisis, a man runs from police when approached, and officers recognize a burglary suspect as someone they've tangled with before.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Missouri police recover a stolen vehicle, a scuffle between two women at a bar escalates to biting, and a concerned neighbor places a possible domestic violence call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A young carjacking suspect in custody gets a tongue-lashing from his mom and aunt, a man terrorizing his mom gets tased, and police give chase to a familiar vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A DUI suspect is incensed about being detained, a woman calls police regarding a naked man on her porch, and an eight-year-old girl deprived of social media throws a tantrum.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police track a vehicle leaving a known drug house, officers sort out the facts of a domestic disturbance call, and a daughter trashes her parents' house and threatens police.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police try to settle a dispute between roommates, a jilted man causes a disturbance at a public park twice in one day, and an erratic driver proves to be surprisingly sober.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Tinted car windows draw suspicion from a roaming patrol, a concerned friend gets a punch in the nose, and a traffic stop leads police a meth pipe in an odd place.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist wanted by police hides out in his mom's garage, a man won't leave his ex-fiancee alone, and a pregnant woman gets busted for meth possession.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer on street patrol chases down a suspect on foot, an alleged car thief posts his exploits on Facebook, and a crashed stolen car may not have been stolen after all.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A police pursuit of a truck leaving a known drug location ends in a crash, undercover officers move in for a drug bust, and a man recklessly fires his handgun in the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer pursues an unruly bicyclist, a man ducks into a drive-through in an attempt to elude police, and a deputy pulls over a stolen vehicle driven by a repeat offender.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A resistant suspect thinks he sees monsters everywhere. Cops are forced to officiate a spousal wrestling match. Officers try to sort out where two motorists got their car and whose dope they possess.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wild-eyed man leads police on a chase that ends in a Tasing, officers respond to an in-progress lovers' spat, and a traffic stop results in drug and auto theft charges.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver takes his unsuspecting passenger on a wild ride as he tries to evade police, a man's date is cut short by a traffic stop, and police are called to evict a roommate.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man arrested on warrants just wants his wife, a vagrant is caught on camera stealing from a liquor store, and officers check on a woman asleep on the side of the road.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police have a breakthrough in a burglary case, a man found with drugs in his pants claims the pants are not his, and officers deal with a familiar domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers wrestle with a familiar nuisance to shop owners, a man's lucky dollar lets him down during a traffic stop, and too much whiskey leads to a domestic disturbance call.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The lone holdout on a jury is found dead in the jury room. The eleven jurors who were voting guilty and who hated the dead juror are the natural suspects.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman found murdered in her home. Her resemblance to Sara causes Grissom to take a personal interest in the case and forces him to examine the decisions he has made in his life.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara, and Nick respond to an electrocution at a casino. The casino is hosting Japanese antiquities. The electrocution is just a ruse to steal the central piece of the exhibit.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A robbery at a grocery store results in a shootout leaving five dead. The police officer at the scene believes Grissom has a grudge against him.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The whole team must investigate a crime where a husband and his porn star wife were murdered execution-style.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Sara deal with the death of what at first seems to be a transvestite.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A mutilated female body is discovered tied to the undercarriage of a bus carrying prisoners from a women's correctional facility after a severed arm flies out from beneath the vehicle and strikes a car.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A violent murder in a casino parking garage and another episode in the police interview room lead the CSIs to one shocking discovery after another.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick, Catherine, and Nick try to determine the cause of a house fire that kills a teenage girl. The fire is in the same neighborhood as a similar arson fire. Grissom and Sara investigate a man found dead with letter tiles in his stomach.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine, and Nick investigate the death of a runner during a competition. Meanwhile, Sara and Warrick investigate the death of a couple in a hotel room, initially thought to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A roller coaster runs off its track, leaving six people dead. The CSI team investigates whether this was an accident or foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two young men are found murdered after scamming Sam Braun's casinos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A casino employee is beaten and raped on her way home from work, but she survives and identifies her attacker.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A feverish night in Las Vegas results in one dead male in an alien suit, one more dead male in a bathtub, one dead female with two suspicous men at the scene, and another dead male with a polaroid of yet another dead male.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom es llamado por el asesinato de una joven de 17 años en el ático de un casino. Todo el equipo se ve involucrado cuando se descubre que se ha producido un secuestro junto con el asesinato.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer que había sido detenida por la policía aparece asesinada a tres kilómetros de la parada. No pasa mucho tiempo antes de que Robbins determine que la mujer, genéticamente hablando, no es una mujer.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom se enfrenta a nuevas pruebas mientras está en el estrado de un juicio por asesinato del dueño de un restaurante.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Grissom y su equipo investigan la muerte por inanición de un niño de cinco años. Descubren que el niño tiene hermanos que también están en peligro.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Greg, para su competencia final, tiene que determinar cómo fue asesinado el Sherlock Holmes de un club de Sherlock Holmes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Warrick investiga el asesinato de un hombre por alguien que aparentemente necesita una silla de ruedas. Nick investiga el asesinato de una mujer en la subcultura del narcocorrido, canciones sobre asesinatos relacionados con las drogas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Warrick y Nick encuentran el cadáver de dos mujeres en unas obras enterradas bajo el alquitrán.El turno de swing se adentra en el mundo de las novias extranjeras por correo.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sofía, Sara y Greg investigan la desaparición de una mujer que volvía a casa tras una noche de fiesta con una amiga después de que su coche abandonado aparezca en el arcén de una autopista.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un importante jugador de Las Vegas aparece muerto, Ecklie ordena a ambos equipos que investiguen el caso. El hombre que tenía secretos sobre todos en Las Vegas tenía uno muy grande propio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine, Nick y Warrick investigan un cadáver gravemente mutilado en el bosque. Grissom, Sarah y Greg intentan determinar cómo fue asesinado un hombre en una habitación de hotel. Esto les lleva a una convención de mujeres grandes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Un asesino en serie ataca de nuevo, y el equipo de CSI prueba una nueva tecnología utilizando pruebas de un asesinato anterior.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Sara y Greg investigan un incendio forestal que mató a un hombre y quemó gravemente a una mujer. Catherine, Nick y Warrick se ocupan del caso de una familia de tres miembros asesinada en su casa.

programme.title: El abogado del mal

programme.desc: Un miembro de la policía militar investiga una serie de asesinatos infantiles que ocurren durante la era de Stalin en la Unión Soviética.

programme.title: In & Out
programme.desc: Howard es un profesor de literatura y está a punto de casarse, pero todo se complica cuando uno de sus ex-alumnos gana un Oscar y se lo dedica a su “profesor homosexual”.

programme.title: Tómalo con calma
programme.desc: John Travolta regresa como Chili Palmer en esta película, así que "Tómalo con calma". Con un reparto lleno de estrellas como Uma Thurman y The Rock, esta película cuenta la cómica historia de un mafioso que quiere ser un gigante de la música.

programme.title: Wild Bill
programme.desc: El inicio de la carrera de Wild Bill Hickock como un legendario hombre de leyes y culmina en su reubicación en Deadwood, donde se produce el reencuentro con Calamity Jane.

programme.title: Shaft
programme.desc: Para detener a un asesino racista, Shaft tiene que rastrear al único testigo que puede dejarlo tras las rejas. Shaft se acerca a la par del peligro.

programme.title: Tiempo de morir

programme.title: La última pelea
programme.desc: La última pelea" narra la conmovedora e inspiracional historia de la familia Conlon, Brendan (Joel Edgerton), Tommy (Tom Hardy) y Paddy (Nick Nolte), quienes encuentran redención en la arena al luchar para arreglarse a sí mismos y a su familia.

programme.title: Peligro inminente
programme.desc: Cuando su mentor, el almirante James Greer, se enferma, Ryan es nombrado director en funciones de la CIA.

programme.title: Apocalypto
programme.desc: Cuando el reino maya está al borde del colapso, un joven se embarca en un peligroso viaje hacia un mundo dominado por el miedo y la opresión.

programme.title: Cody Banks: destino Londres

programme.desc: Basado en la novela de Michael Crichton. Rescate en el tiempo, cuenta la historia de un profesor que, sin darse cuenta, se catapulta de vuelta a la Francia del siglo XIV, en medio de la Guerra de los 100 años.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Lara Croft Tomb Raider: la cuna de la vida
programme.desc: Lara Croft viaja por todo el mundo en busca de la legendaria Caja de Pandora. Si Lara fracasa y la caja cae en manos de los criminales Jonathan Reiss y Chen Lo, millones de personas morirán.

programme.title: El monje
programme.desc: Chow Yun Fat y Seann William Scott protagonizan esta gran aventura, en la que un misterioso monje tibetano, quien ha protejido un pergamino por 60 años; cree que ha encontrado a su sucesor: un joven callejero.

programme.title: Lara Croft: Tomb Raider
programme.desc: La ganadora del Oscar Angelina Jolie reinventa al héroe de acción moderno en la película Lara Croft: Tomb Raider. Lara Croft nació dentro de la opulencia y fue educada en las escuelas más exclusivas

programme.title: Los lunamieleros
programme.desc: El conductor de autobuses Ralph Kramden y el ingeniero de saneamiento ambiental Ed Norton son amigos que sueñan con llegar lejos. Su plan para volverse ricos los hace contratar a un entrenador de perros (Leguizamo) para hacer competir a su galgo.

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II
programme.desc: Justo cuando el australiano excéntrico comienza a acostumbrarse a la vida en la ciudad de Nueva York, Dundee y su hermosa novia (Linda Kozlowski) son blanco de muerte de una pandilla de feroces traficantes de drogas.

programme.title: Ladron Que Roba a Ladron (LAS)
programme.desc: Un par de ladrones profesionales hallan complicado su plan para robar a un millonario después de que los miembros hábiles del equipo regular rechazan el plan. Los ladrones se verán forzados a contratar a novatos para completar el trabajo.

programme.title: Ladrones
programme.desc: Fernando Colunga y Eduardo Yáñez lideran las risas como los Robin Hoods modernos en esta tremendamente entretenida secuela del gran éxito "Ladrón que roba a ladrón".

programme.title: Cocodrilo Dundee
programme.desc: Michael J. "Cocodrilo" Dundee es un australiano de espíritu libre que caza cocodrilos con las manos, les clava la mirada a búfalos de agua y bebe hasta desmadrarse.

programme.title: "Cocodrilo" Dundee II

programme.title: Camino a Marte
programme.desc: Fue amor a primera vista entre José y Abril, pero un accidente causa la muerte de José. En el cielo lo tiene todo, excepto a Abril. José convence a su ángel de la guardia de dejarlo volver a Tierra.

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: Todos queremos a alguien
programme.desc: Karla Souza interpreta a una joven doctora soltera en Los Ángeles quien está dividida entre dos amantes y dos posibles amores, en esta divertida comedia romántica bilingüe.

programme.title: No eres tú, soy yo
programme.desc: Después de la ruptura de su reciente matrimonio, Javier se encuentra en una depresión de la que ni siquiera un psiquiatra puede ayudarlo a salir. Sin embargo, la esperanza está en camino en la forma improbable de sus exnovias.

programme.title: Instructions Not Included
programme.desc: Valentin (Eugenio Derbez) is Acapulco’s resident playboy until his life gets turned upside down when a former fling leaves a baby girl on his doorstep.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Purasangre
programme.desc: Purasangre narra la historia de cómo un equipo de cinco profesionales se ve obligado a robar un famoso hipódromo y casino.

programme.title: La hija de la luz
programme.desc: Con rasgos que rememoran al sexto sentido y la profecía llega este fascinante thriller sobrenatural lleno de escalofríos y un gran suspenso.

programme.title: El bebé de Rosemary
programme.desc: La historia de una joven pareja que espera su primer bebé. Como casi todas las primerizas, Rosemary se siente confundida. Su marido, un actor ambicioso pero sin éxito, hace un pacto con el diablo que promete llevar su carrera a la fama.

programme.title: La Sombra De La Noche
programme.desc: Un estudiante de derecho intenta ganar dinero como vigilante nocturno en la morgue de la ciudad. Pero pronto el turno nocturno es de terror cuando un asesino serial siembra el caos y deja pistas que señalan a Martin como sospechoso.

programme.title: Cambiapieles
programme.desc: Un niño de 12 años y su madre se convierten en el objetivo de dos manadas de hombres lobo en guerra, cada una con intenciones y motivos diferentes.

programme.title: La conspiración del diablo
programme.desc: Un culto satánico roba la Sábana Santa de Turín para fines malvados.

programme.title: Visitantes
programme.desc: Espíritus malignos atormentan a una exitosa doctora (Kate del Castillo) y a su familia, haciendo que enloquezcan y desconfíen el uno del otro.

programme.title: Fort Yuma
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: The Gunfight at Dodge City
programme.desc: Seeking a fresh start, Bat Masterson (Joel McCrea) rolls into Dodge City with a chip on his shoulder and a gun on his hip. But soon, his mysterious past will catch up with him when an old friend calls in a favor...one that might cost him his life!

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Man of the West
programme.desc: Screen legend Gary Cooper demonstrates why he will always be remembered as one of the most authentic stars of the screen. Capable yet vulnerable, Cooper's portrayal of a former outlaw whose past returns to haunt him ranks among his very best.

programme.title: The Gunfighter
programme.desc: A retired gunslinger is forced to strap on his six-shooters once again by the vengeful brothers of a man he killed in self-defense.

programme.title: The Big Country
programme.desc: Burl Ives earned a Best Supporting Actor Oscar for his portrayal of a family patriarch involved in a bitter land feud in this explosive western drama that also features a sumptuous musical score.

programme.title: Sam Whiskey

programme.title: Flower Drum Song
programme.desc: A young woman arrives in San Francisco's Chinatown from Hong Kong with the intention of marrying a rakish nightclub owner, unaware he is involved with one of his singers.

programme.title: Guys and Dolls
programme.desc: In New York, a gambler is challenged to take a cold female missionary to Havana, but they fall for each other, and the bet has a hidden motive to finance a crap game.

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.title: The Odd Couple

programme.desc: Rob invites an old Army pal home to dinner but begins to fear he has a jewel thief on his hands.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob fears he is no longer needed when his co-writers do a show without his help.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Homer Bedloe's, arch-enemy of the Hooterville Cannonball, returns to Hooterville Valley in adject disgrace and poverty.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Bobbie Joe enters a contest sponsored by Gibney's Old English Tomato Sauce and wins first prize-an English butler.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate battles rural postmasters to recover an ill-advised letter from the mails.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Tomboy Betty Jo goes looking for a husband on the premise that fate has singles her out to become the next bride in the community.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: High- schooler Betty Jo poses as a college coed to gain the interest of a handsome college boy.

programme.title: Gomer Pyle, U.S.M.C.
programme.desc: Gomer befriends a couple who claim Camp Henderson is on their land.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Lisa's dreams come true, and so do Oliver's nightmares, when Eb discovers a runaway boy sleeping in the hay in their barn. Lisa is only too excited about the idea of having the sounds of platters of little feet around the house.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Arnold, the Ziffels' television-loving pig, has taken on a paper route to save enough money for a new color set. But when bank robbers show up and threaten his dreams, and Lisa and Oliver are held captive in their own home, Arnold has to fight back.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: The farmers of Hooterville are headed to France! Or at least they are if they can get organized. As part of an agricultural exchange program, the farmers are offered a chance to join a chartered government flight to Europe.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Love is in the air as the first day of spring arrives in Hooterville. And who better to lead the town in celebrating it than Lisa. She is resolved to show Oliver just what spring is all about and sets out to produce a Spring festival celebration.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's a hair-raising episode as Eb (Tom Lester) enrolls in a correspondence course to become a barber. Lisa (Eva Gabor) and Oliver (Eddie Albert) give him the money to learn the trade but learning how to cut hair by mail has its glitches.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Two crop-dusting pilots who worked for orange grower Clint Carpenter have vanished without a trace. Joe Mannix is asked by his former military buddy, Dave Winters, who runs the crop-dusting service, to help solve the mystery of their disappearance.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix travels to northern California, where he's been hired by the sister of a young man who disputes the cause of her brother's death.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A retired hit man returns to San Francisco, not knowing that he will be the target of a hit.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A murder brings to light a coin dealer's plan to substitute fakes for the rare coins in a collection.

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Stone discovers that a murdered woman was involved with both a famous newspaper reporter and his son.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: On the eve of his wedding to Harriet De Long, Sheriff Bill Gillespie is stalked by a vengeance-seeking killer in a case of mistaken identity when a newspaper accidentally uses a photo of Gillespie in a story about the previous sheriff, Will McComb.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: (1/2) When Virgil Tibbs joins the Sparta, MI, police, resentment festers in Chief of Police Bill Gillespie. (2/2) After Nan and, subsequently, Willie Jones' murders, racial tensions are especially high in Sparta.

programme.desc: Police Chief Bill Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) and Chief of Detectives Virgil Tibbs (Howard Rollins) are at odds when Tibbs suspects that Gillespie's old friend, Sonny Mims, killed his wife because of his involvement with the dead woman's cousin.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Emotions run high when a black businessman (Randy Brooks) comes to Sparta to buy the town's newspaper, and it is suspected that he is romancing the paper's married white owner (Nana Visitor). Carroll O'Connor and Howard Rollins star.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: Sparta is overjoyed when a local boy turned, successful businessman offers to bring new prosperity to the Mississippi hamlet by moving his business interests back home. But all of his business interests may not be exactly legal. (Part 1 of 2)

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: After Virgil (Howard Rollins) narrowly escapes death at the hands of Ritchie Epson's henchmen, Chief Gillespie (Carroll O'Connor) still does not have enough evidence to prove that former hometown boy Epson (Bill Sadler) is a major drug supplier.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-0
programme.desc: McGarrett reopens 7yr old case of missing youth after crime writer calls out Five-O's incompetence. Evidence shows murder. McGarrett presses grandmother & Marshall on withheld info to uncover the killer's identity & motive.

programme.desc: Kimble almost becomes victim to a mob because of an imaginative child. Gina Gillespie guest stars.

programme.title: The Fugitive

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver unwittingly invades an encampment in the Burmese jungle.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver flees from the Budapest police and the KGB while attempting to free a band of gypsy pickpockets imprisoned for stealing a watch containing top-secret information.

programme.title: MacGyver

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Dr. Sloan treats Amanda and Jesse to lunch to acknowledge Amanda's medical examiner investigation award. Unfortunately, their festivities are interrupted when a young man collapses in the hotel restaurant wearing only a bathrobe.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: A serial killer is on the loose at Community General, targeting both patients and doctors. Dr. Sloan, Steve, Amanda, and Jesse notice that a murder takes place every hour on the hour.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Jesse witnesses a car accident and rushes to help the beautiful victim, Chloe Marsden, who has stopped breathing. After a quick application of CPR, Chloe is revived and finds Jesse accompanying her to the hospital.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: To Steve, Jesse, and Amanda's embarrassment, Dr. Sloan rehearses with a swing band at BBQ Bob's as he prepares for a benefit dance for the children's unit at the hospital. But the mood quickly transforms into a tone of horror.

programme.title: Diagnosis Murder
programme.desc: Steve meets up with his young protégé, Tommy Allen, but is ready to strangle him when he finds out that Tommy was involved in another brawl, this time at BBQ Bob's!

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: A charge of attempted murder spurs Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) to invade the lair of vicious killers and kidnap the only man who can clear him.

programme.title: Kung Fu
programme.desc: Kwai Chang Caine (DAVID CARRADINE) continues his search for his American half-brother, only to learn that Danny Caine is being drawn into a shootout by an ambitious gunfighter.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: After bad luck continues to befall the family, the Brady boys set out to learn about the ancient tiki. They learn the tiki is tabu and must be discarded at an ancient burial ground.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The Brady boys arrive at the cave to return the idol to the burial site, only to be held prisoners by an angry archaeologist who lays claim to the cave and believes that they stole the idol.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia is apprehensive about her first day of high school, so Mike asks Greg to help break the ice for her. Meanwhile, Peter tries to make a working volcano for the Science Club.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Peter has a crush on Jan's new friend but every plan to impress her backfires. Inspired by "Cyrano de Bergerac", he launches a final plan to win her over with Greg's help but it also backfires when she falls for Greg instead.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: The boys try to spook the girls in the middle of the night with a ghost, so they try to get revenge by giving them a taste of their own medicine. But after Alice criticizes them for being so scared, the kids collectively have a new target.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan feels disrespected and ignored by her brothers and sisters, so she tells everyone that she wishes she was an only child. Meanwhile, Carol and Alice have a competition over who can cook the best strawberry preserves.

programme.title: All in the Family

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Pelo de perro

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En las zonas rurales de Canadá, el Dr. John Schneeberger es acusado de sedar y agredir sexualmente a una de sus pacientes y a su hijastra. Las pruebas de ADN demuestran que el doctor es inocente, pero la paciente insiste en que la sedó y violó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Asesino forestal
programme.desc: Un asesino intentó incinerar y destruir todo lo que pudiera relacionarlo con su crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El fotógrafo profesional Charles Rathbun afirma que la modelo Linda Sobek murió durante un encuentro sexual consensuado que salió mal, pero el cadáver de Sobek y las imágenes digitales cuentan una historia más siniestra.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentra muerto al cirujano cardíaco Darryl Sutorius en el sótano de su lujosa casa de Cincinnati, la policía asume que se suicidó.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un cirujano es apuñalado hasta la muerte y el sospechoso más probable es visto en un restaurante al momento del asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La mujer estaba muerta. Al hombre le habían disparado cuatro veces pero sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Susan Fassett fue abatida a tiros cuando salía de su práctica de coro de la iglesia en Poughkeepsie, Nueva York. Su esposo Jeff se convirtió en el principal sospechoso, hasta que fue absuelto por la policía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cabecera
programme.desc: Cuando los cazadores encontraron un cráneo en un cañón de Texas, la policía encontró trozos de ropa, huesos pequeños y un mechón de cabello.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando la policía encuentra el cuerpo de Krista Harrison, de 11 años, hay pocas pistas sobre la identidad del asesino. Pero las autoridades están intrigadas por las inusuales fibras naranjas incrustadas en la ropa que se encuentran cerca de la víctima.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la víspera de Navidad de 2005, se encuentra el cuerpo de un hombre ardiendo cerca de Baltimore. Finalmente fue identificado como Wesley Person, de 26 años.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Un hombre desaparece un año después de haber comenzado una aventura con la esposa de su amigo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1994, Shannon Melendi, de 19 años, desapareció mientras estaba en la Universidad de Emory. Su desaparición permaneció un misterio durante diez años, hasta que una nueva prueba científica proporcionó una nueva pista sobre Colvin "Butch" Hinton.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Obsesión de verano
programme.desc: En un próspero suburbio de Filadelfia, la policía fue llamada a la escena de lo que parecía ser un ahogamiento accidental.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Lleno de humo
programme.desc: Cuando una pareja de ancianos murió en un sospechoso incendio en casa, su hijo se convirtió en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Cuarto Frío
programme.desc: Se recuenta la desaparición en 1987 de Tracy Jo Shine, residente de Houston. La investigación se enfrió hasta el 2000, cuando un 'escuadrón de casos sin resolver' se enteró de que el exnovio de la mujer, Michael Neal, se había jactado de haberla matado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Dientes o Consecuencias
programme.desc: La investigación de un asesinato se ve obstaculizada por la falta de un cuerpo, pero la policía encuentra algunos restos carbonizados, incluyendo un diente cuyo relleno contiene propiedades que ayudan a los investigadores a identificar el cadáver.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1986, Gary Dale Larson fue asesinado a puñaladas en su casa de Edmond, Oklahoma. El asesino agredió sexualmente a la novia de Larson, Janet Haynes.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1985, 121 personas en Dakota del Sur y Minnesota sufrieron una misteriosa enfermedad. Solo había habido un brote como ese, y cuando sucedió entonces, nadie pudo entender por qué.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Trago de pecados
programme.desc: Una mirada retrospectiva a un trío de asesinatos sin resolver que ocurrieron en Wichita Falls, Texas durante la década de 1980, detalla cómo un cuarto asesinato durante el mismo período le proporcionó a la policía más de lo que se dieron cuenta.

programme.desc: Chaos follows when Snooki and JWoww get the ladies to spill the tea. Vinny makes a love connection with someone unexpected. An argument between the women leads to a very awkward dinner.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: What happens when a working mum with strong family values clashes with parents who put themselves first?

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: Two families, both whom have never met, have agreed that the Wives will swap homes, children and husbands for two weeks to see what they can learn from their own lives.

programme.title: Wife Swap UK
programme.desc: Two families, both whom have never met, have agreed that the Wives will swap homes, children and husbands for two weeks to see what they can learn from their own lives.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Red, White and a Little Blue
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls display their ability to rock an audience as they perform at a USO show for military veterans.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Video Vixens
programme.desc: With only six girls left in the house, tensions run high as Bret tests the girls' creativity by making them shoot, direct and edit their own music videos.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: The Slaps, Smacks, Screams and Spit You Never Saw
programme.desc: A lot of crazy stuff has happened in Flav's house since the girls arrived.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Viva La Flav
programme.desc: The final two girls remain. To celebrate having made it this far, Flav takes the two girls to Puerto Vallarta for an exotic three day Mexican getaway.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: After the Lovin (Finale)
programme.desc: Flavor Flav and all 20 of the original Flavorettes are back for a reunion show like you've never seen before.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Sumthin's Stinkin' in the House of Flav
programme.desc: Flavor Flav welcomes 20 new women to his mansion with the hope of finding someone “real” this time around.

programme.title: Flavor of Love: Flav is Blind
programme.desc: Flavor Flav challenges his remaining fourteen Flavorettes to a blind speed dating competition (to get to know them without the influence of “physicality-ness”).

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky feels isolated at home since helping turn in her brother. Looking for a distraction, she finds her escape in online gaming. Drew’s excited for the last days of the Hollingsworth campaign but his charm gets him more than he bargained for.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is in trouble! He was fired from the campaign, his friends think he’s a home-wrecker, and he’s even in a fight with Dallas.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When Tristan asks Mr. Yates for some writing help for his MC gig, Mr. Yates suggests he come to his apartment for some extra help. Imogen crushes hard on Jack and is determined to prove she can “roll” with her crowd.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan is warned by Mr. Yates to make his feelings about their affair less obvious at school but Tristan can’t help it, he’s beaming.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë's trial begins and when she fears that she is being painted in a harsh light, she takes matters into her own hands. Becky is torn up about what she’s going to say when she takes the stand as a character witness in her brother’s trial.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The media is abuzz about Zoë’s trial. Feeling hopeless and worried about her tarnished reputation, Zoë is nervous as the verdict approaches. Becky is torn about what to say in her testimony, but deep down knows what she has to do.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Will a superstorm headed for Toronto stall a Degrassi dance? Maya, Zig & Zoë plan to attend but get stranded at the Matlin house.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare is forced to spend the night with Eli while in New York City. Maya and Zoë seek refuge in The Dot with nothing to do but sort out their rivalry. Drew searches for missing Becky. Miles and Tristan share a bonding moment during the storm.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has a serious dilemma that will affect her entire future and confides in Alli and Jenna.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew's not taking the easy way out - he's going to be part of his child's life, whether Clare wants it or not.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Frankie isn't a little girl anymore!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Clare has to muster up the courage to tell Eli about her situation.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky and her brother Luke’s relationship is very strained and even with her faith as strong as it is, she can't bring herself to forgive him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya can’t sleep. She’s having nightmares about Miles’ safety, and they’re becoming all too familiar.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoë receives texts from an unknown number, threatening that they know the people behind the Power Squad’s scandalous fundraising initiative.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Tristan organizes an intervention for Miles, but it only pushes him further away.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Drew is committed to keeping Becky happy but his situation with Clare has his attention divided.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Simpson calls an assembly to address the offending fundraising website.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi's fundraising scandal threatens to ruin Frankie's relationship with her father.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Mr. Hollingsworth’s campaign is in its final stretch, and the stress has him even more tense than usual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Degrassi is now in the hands of a new, strict Administrator which means new, strict rules.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Winston is set to play the lead in his musical but is not pleased that Lola could star opposite him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It’s Frankie’s birthday, and she’s going to celebrate it, Hollingsworth style -- with a Gatsby party!

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Zoe is facing jail time following the fundraising scandal

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Becky has feelings for Jonah, but she isn't sure what to do with them.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Maya has someone on her mind, and is questioning the house rules Mrs. Matlin has set.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
